bullets: Leading end-to-end operational workflows across finance, administration, and cross-functional teams
Driving process improvements and operational efficiency initiatives to support company scaling objectives
Oversaw end-to-end daily finance operations including AP/AR management, invoice processing, and payment/collection activities
Executed account reconciliations and contributed to month-end financial closing including adjusting entries and financial statement preparation
Ensured integrity and completeness of financial records and documentation, maintaining high standards of accuracy and compliance
Produced regular financial reports and delivered budget and forecast variance analysis to support management decision-making
Assisted 90+ individual taxpayers and entrepreneurs in accurately filing SPT PPh 23 returns, reducing errors and increasing on-time submissions by 30%
Spearheaded community outreach programs in Bantul Regency, educating 200+ taxpayers on compliance benefits and contributing to the Patuh Pajak initiative
Designed and promoted tax literacy campaigns on Instagram & TikTok, simplifying complex tax concepts into digestible content to enhance public trust
Resolved tax challenges through consultation and pioneered Core Tax system adoption
